functions.name: FilterBar
params:
{
  open,
  draft,
  movies,
  onChangeDraft,
  onSearch,
  onReset,
  search,
  onSearchChange,
}

callGraph.callee:
Array.from({ length: max - min + 1 }, (_, i) => i + min)
            .filter((y) => y % 5 === 0)
            .map

Array.from({ length: max - min + 1 }, (_, i) => i + min)
            .filter

functions.name: PosterCard
params:
{
  movie,
  isHovered,
  onHover,
  onClick,
  pref,
  onTogglePref,
}

callGraph.callee:
recentIds
    .map((id) => movies.find((m) => m.tmdb_id === id))
    .filter((m): m is Movie => Boolean(m))
    .slice
